briefing_zh:
今日 AI 研究的主线是**具身智能**与**高效推理**的双轮驱动。在机器人方向，**RoboDojo** 填补了通用机器人操控评测的空缺，提供了同时覆盖仿真与真实世界的统一基准，与此同时 **Scaling MoE Video Pretraining** 探索了用互联网规模视频数据预训练具身模型，试图跨越从视频生成到机器人控制的鸿沟。**Dual Latent Memory** 则为 VLA 模型引入双记忆机制，让机器人具备长时序任务所需的「短期工作记忆」和「长期技能记忆」。

在语言模型效率侧，**SWE-1.7**（Cognition 出品）以极低成本实现了前沿级 agentic coding 性能，其熵保持采样和自压缩技术为长上下文 rollout 提供了新思路。**Gemma 4** 技术报告进一步确认了 MoE 架构在端侧多模态推理的主导地位，2.3B 到 31B 覆盖完整规模谱系。**DSpark** 则在推测解码领域提出置信度调度方案，解决了 semi-autoregressive 草稿生成中的接受率衰减问题。

开源工具生态方面，**UI-MOPD** 探索了跨平台 GUI Agent 的持续学习，解决多平台交互轨迹稀缺的瓶颈；**NapMem** 则将长期用户记忆从被动检索升级为主动导航，让 agent 能够决策「该记什么、何时检索、如何更新」。GitHub 趋势侧，**openscience** 作为开源科研 AI workbench 以超 1800 颗星成为本周最热项目，多个个人交易研究 Agent 和 Agent 编排工具也在社区快速冒头。
briefing_en:
Today's AI research is driven by two major themes: **embodied intelligence** and **efficient inference**. On the robotics front, **RoboDojo** fills a critical gap with a unified sim-and-real benchmark for generalist manipulation policies, while **Scaling MoE Video Pretraining** explores using internet-scale video data to pretrain embodied models — bridging video generation and robot control. **Dual Latent Memory** introduces a dual-memory architecture to VLA models, enabling both short-term working memory and long-term skill retention for long-horizon tasks.

On the language model efficiency side, **SWE-1.7** from Cognition achieves frontier-level agentic coding performance at a fraction of the cost, leveraging entropy-preserving sampling and self-compaction for long-horizon rollouts. The **Gemma 4** technical report reinforces the MoE architecture's dominance in on-device multimodal reasoning, spanning 2.3B to 31B parameters. **DSpark** advances speculative decoding with confidence-scheduled semi-autoregressive generation, addressing acceptance rate decay in parallel draft models.

In the open-source ecosystem, **UI-MOPD** tackles continual multi-platform GUI agent learning in the face of scarce cross-platform interaction trajectories; **NapMem** upgrades long-term user memory from passive retrieval to active navigation — letting agents decide what to store, when to retrieve, and how to update. On GitHub, **openscience** emerged as the week's hottest project with 1800+ stars as an open-source scientific AI workbench, while personal trading research agents and multi-agent orchestration tools are rapidly gaining traction.
viral_analysis_zh: **SWE-1.7**（Cognition）是今天最可能出圈的项目：以极低成本复现前沿 coding agent 性能，直接戳中「能力与成本不可兼得」的行业痛点，且「fraction of the cost」这个叙事框架天然具有传播性。**Microsoft Flint** 在 HN 获得 267 分，说明「AI agent 专用可视化语言」这一品类正在被大量开发者关注，可视化脚手架是构建 agent 工具链的刚需环节。**openscience** 在一周内积累近 2000 星，科研 AI workbench 赛道的开源化浪潮正在加速。
viral_analysis_en: **SWE-1.7** (Cognition) is today's most likely breakout: it hits the industry's core pain point of capability-vs-cost tradeoff, and the 'frontier intelligence at a fraction of the cost' framing is inherently shareable. **Microsoft Flint** earned 267 points on HN, confirming that 'visualization language for AI agents' is a rapidly emerging category — visual scaffolding is a hard requirement for agent toolchains. **openscience** accumulated nearly 2000 stars in a single week, reflecting the accelerating open-source wave in the scientific AI workbench space.

huggingface_papers.title: Accurate, Interdisciplinary and Transparent Structure-property Understanding with Deep Native Structural Reasoning
huggingface_papers.tldr: Introduces a deep native structural reasoning framework for structure-property relationships in biology, chemistry and materials science. Uses spatial, chemical, and periodic organization to achieve accurate, interpretable predictions across scientific disciplines.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 提出了一种深度原生结构推理框架，用于生物、化学和材料科学中的结构-性质关系分析。通过对空间、化学和周期性组织的建模，实现跨学科的精准、可解释的性质预测。
huggingface_papers.authors: Chen Tang, Yizhou Wang, Jianyu Wu et al.

huggingface_papers.title: Scaling Mixture-of-Experts Video Pretraining for Embodied Intelligence
huggingface_papers.tldr: Proposes scaling MoE architectures for video pretraining to bootstrap embodied intelligence. Bridges the domain gap between content-creation video models and robot control by designing pretraining objectives that prioritize physical, action-relevant visual patterns.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 探索用 MoE 架构对海量视频数据进行预训练，以引导具身智能的发展。通过设计偏向物理动作相关视觉模式的预训练目标，弥合了视频生成模型与机器人控制之间的领域鸿沟。
huggingface_papers.authors: Shuailei Ma, Jiaqi Liao, Xinyang Wang et al.

huggingface_papers.title: Dual Latent Memory in Vision-Language-Action Models for Robotic Manipulation
huggingface_papers.tldr: Presents a dual latent memory mechanism for VLA models: a short-term working memory for current task context and a long-term skill memory for cross-episode retention. Addresses the Markovian assumption limitation that prevents VLAs from handling long-horizon, temporally dependent tasks.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 为 VLA 模型引入双潜在记忆机制：短期工作记忆负责当前任务上下文，长期技能记忆负责跨 episode 保留。解决了马尔可夫假设限制，使 VLA 能够应对长时序、时序依赖性强的机器人操控任务。
huggingface_papers.authors: Hongyu Qu, Jianzhe Gao, Xiaobin Hu et al.

huggingface_papers.title: RoboDojo: A Unified Sim-and-Real Benchmark for Comprehensive Evaluation of Generalist Robot Manipulation Policies
huggingface_papers.tldr: Introduces RoboDojo, a unified benchmark that evaluates generalist robot manipulation policies in both simulation and real-world settings. Covers a wide range of task types and skill complexity to address the limitations of narrow, simulation-only benchmarks.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 提出 RoboDojo，首个同时覆盖仿真与真实环境的通用机器人操控策略评测基准，支持多种任务类型和技能复杂度，填补了现有基准只评测单一场景、任务过于简单的空缺。
huggingface_papers.authors: Tianxing Chen, Yue Chen, Zixuan Li et al.

huggingface_papers.title: Infinite Worlds with Versatile Interactions
huggingface_papers.tldr: Presents LingBot-World 2.0 (LingBot-World-Infinity), an advanced world model with unbounded interaction horizon and four key upgrades over its predecessor. Demonstrates versatile scene interaction capabilities beyond traditional finite-horizon world models.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 提出 LingBot-World 2.0（无限版），在前代基础上实现无界交互时序，支持更丰富的场景交互类型。展示了超越传统有限时序世界模型的多样交互能力。
huggingface_papers.authors: Zelin Gao, Qiuyu Wang, Jiapeng Zhu et al.

alphaxiv_papers.title: SWE-1.7: Frontier Intelligence at a Fraction of the Cost
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Cognition introduces SWE-1.7, their most capable agentic coding model to date, trained via RL on a Kimi K2.7 base. Achieves frontier-level performance at lower cost using entropy-preserving sampling, multi-cluster distributed training, and self-compaction for long-horizon rollouts.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: Cognition 发布 SWE-1.7，基于 Kimi K2.7 通过强化学习训练，是其迄今最强 coding agent 模型。通过熵保持采样、多集群分布式训练和自压缩技术，以极低成本实现前沿级 agentic coding 性能。

alphaxiv_papers.title: LLM-as-a-Verifier: A General-Purpose Verification Framework
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Frames verification — determining the correctness of a solution — as a new scaling axis alongside pre-training, post-training, and test-time compute. Proposes a general-purpose LLM-as-a-Verifier framework that unlocks verification scaling across diverse reasoning and agent tasks.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 将「验证」（判断解答是否正确）定义为与预训练、后训练和推理时计算并列的新扩展轴。提出通用 LLM-as-a-Verifier 框架，在多样化推理和 agent 任务上解锁验证能力的规模化。

alphaxiv_papers.title: UI-MOPD: Multi-Platform On-Policy Distillation for Continual GUI Agent Learning
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Addresses the challenge of continual learning for GUI agents across multiple platforms (web, mobile, desktop). Uses on-policy distillation with cross-platform trajectory data to avoid catastrophic forgetting and improve generalization without requiring expensive re-annotation.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 解决 GUI Agent 在多平台（Web、手机、桌面）上的持续学习问题。通过跨平台轨迹的 on-policy 蒸馏，避免灾难性遗忘，在无需昂贵重标注的情况下提升跨平台泛化能力。

alphaxiv_papers.title: From Passive Retrieval to Active Memory Navigation: Learning to Use Memory as a Structured Action Space
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Introduces NapMem, a framework that treats long-term user memory as a structured action space rather than a passive retrieval interface. The agent learns to actively navigate memory — deciding what to store, when to retrieve, and how to update — via RL, enabling truly personalized conversational AI.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 提出 NapMem，将长期用户记忆从被动检索接口升级为结构化动作空间。Agent 通过强化学习主动导航记忆，自主决策「该存什么、何时检索、如何更新」，实现真正个性化的对话 AI。

alphaxiv_papers.title: Gemma 4 Technical Report
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Google releases Gemma 4, a family of open-weight natively multimodal models spanning 2.3B to 31B parameters with dense and MoE architectures. Designed for compute efficiency and reasoning, featuring improved multilingual support and on-device deployment capability.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: Google 发布 Gemma 4 技术报告，涵盖 2.3B 到 31B 的开源权重多模态模型系列，采用 Dense 和 MoE 架构。专注计算效率和推理能力，支持多语言和端侧部署。

github_repos.name: synthetic-sciences/openscience
github_repos.tldr: Open-source AI workbench for scientific research — notebooks, agents, RAG pipelines, and experiment tracking in one platform. Positioned as the open alternative to closed scientific AI tools, with 1830 stars and 261 forks accumulated in under a week.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 面向科研的开源 AI workbench，集 notebook、agent、RAG 流水线和实验追踪于一体。定位为封闭科研 AI 工具的开源替代，不到一周积累 1830 颗星和 261 个 fork。

github_repos.name: simonlin1212/Vibe-Research
github_repos.tldr: Personal trading research agent for A-shares, US stocks, and HK stocks. Provides daily market review, portfolio analysis, and investment insights powered by AI agents — targeting retail investors who want institutional-grade research automation.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 面向 A 股、美股、港股的个人投研 Agent，支持每日复盘、持仓分析和投资见解生成。让普通投资者获得机构级研究自动化能力，一周内获 565 星。

github_repos.name: NateBJones-Projects/ringer
github_repos.tldr: Ringer is a parallel AI-agent swarm orchestrator with Ringside as its native mission-control interface. Enables spawning and coordinating fleets of AI agents for complex multi-step tasks with built-in observability.
github_repos.tldr_zh: Ringer 是一个并行 AI agent 群编排器，附带 Ringside 原生任务控制界面。支持批量生成和协调 agent 舰队执行复杂多步任务，内置可观测性支持。

github_repos.name: epilande/ccmux
github_repos.tldr: ccmux lets developers track all AI coding agents — Claude Code, Codex, Cursor — simultaneously in tmux, providing a unified dashboard for multi-agent coding workflows. Fills the observability gap when running multiple agents in parallel.
github_repos.tldr_zh: ccmux 在 tmux 中同时追踪 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 等多个 AI coding agent，提供统一的多 agent 编码工作流仪表板，填补并行运行多 agent 时的可观测性空白。

github_repos.name: ohad6k/ditto
github_repos.tldr: Ditto mines Claude Code and Codex session logs to build a local you.md agent profile — capturing your coding patterns, preferences, and recurring decisions. Enables personalized agent behavior without manual prompt engineering.
github_repos.tldr_zh: Ditto 挖掘 Claude Code 和 Codex 的会话日志，构建本地 you.md agent 档案，捕捉你的编码模式、偏好和惯性决策，无需手动 prompt 工程即可实现个性化 agent 行为。

hackernews.title: Show HN: Microsoft releases Flint, a visualization language for AI agents
hackernews.tldr: Microsoft open-sources Flint, a declarative visualization language specifically designed for AI agent outputs — charts, diagrams, and structured displays generated natively by agents. Addresses the mismatch between free-form agent outputs and structured data visualization.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 微软开源 Flint，一种专为 AI agent 输出设计的声明式可视化语言，支持 agent 原生生成图表和结构化展示。解决了自由形式 agent 输出与结构化数据可视化之间的错配问题。267 分登顶当日 HN。

hackernews.title: Ask HN: Another Hacker News with less AI and more human-focused hacking news?
hackernews.tldr: A community discussion thread asking whether there is a HN alternative focused on human-centric hacking and tech news, with less AI content saturation. Reflects a growing developer sentiment that AI is overshadowing other technical topics on major platforms.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 社区讨论是否存在以人本技术为核心、AI 内容更少的 HN 替代平台。反映了开发者群体中 AI 内容正在主导主要技术社区的集体焦虑。

hackernews.title: Show HN: Kastor – Terraform-style specs for AI agents
hackernews.tldr: Kastor brings infrastructure-as-code thinking to AI agent orchestration — define agent behaviors, capabilities, and workflows in declarative spec files like Terraform does for infra. Targets teams that want reproducible, version-controlled agent configurations.
hackernews.tldr_zh: Kastor 将基础设施即代码的思维引入 AI agent 编排，用声明式 spec 文件定义 agent 行为和工作流，类似 Terraform 管理基础设施。目标用户是需要可复现、版本控制 agent 配置的团队。

hackernews.title: Agentic test processes, LLM benchmarks, and other notes on agentic coding from danluu
hackernews.tldr: Dan Luu shares empirical notes on agentic coding workflows — including test process design, benchmark variance, and practical limitations of current LLMs in real software engineering tasks. A grounded counterpoint to benchmark-optimism, with concrete failure modes documented.
hackernews.tldr_zh: Dan Luu 分享 agentic coding 工作流的实证观察，涵盖测试流程设计、基准方差和当前 LLM 在真实软件工程任务中的实际局限。以具体失败案例为佐证，对基准乐观主义形成有力反驳。

hackernews.title: Show HN: Requirements Engineering with Formal Verification
hackernews.tldr: FizzBee.ai brings formal verification to requirements engineering — automatically checking that system specifications are logically consistent and complete before implementation begins. Targets AI-assisted software projects where spec drift and ambiguity are common failure modes.
hackernews.tldr_zh: FizzBee.ai 将形式化验证引入需求工程，在实现开始前自动检查系统规格的逻辑一致性和完整性。专为 AI 辅助软件项目设计，解决规格漂移和模糊性这两大常见失败模式。
